query: Hades II Post-Launch Patch 3 patch notes latest changes

mako.raw:
{"query":"Hades II Post-Launch Patch 3 patch notes latest changes","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1090,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://hades.fandom.com/wiki/Post-Launch_Patch_2","title":"Post-Launch Patch 2 - Hades Wiki","content":"- Fated Prophecy Updates: Prophecies about characters such as Odysseus and Arachne now have new narrated conclusion scenes, which can be viewed in the Fated List once those Prophecies are fulfilled.
- You may now skip most of the narrated Homer outcomes after a successful clear (he won't really mind)
- Fixed controller vibration not working while petting Cerberus (once you can do so)"},{"url":"https://nintendoeverything.com/hades-2-post-launch-update-announced-patch-notes/","title":"Hades 2 post-launch update announced, patch notes","content":"It’ll be a bit before the patch rolls out on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch, but look for it in the near future.
Hades 2 will be getting enhancements to the True Ending, lots of other improvements and adjustments, and bug fixes.
Hades 2 post-launch update patch notes
As part of this, increased the number of Underworld clears required, and added to and revised parts of the main True Ending scenes before the end credits.
Note: The vast majority of changes are to the Underworld route; the Surface route is mostly unchanged.
Returning to a Real Possibility: Added Cauldron incantation lets you return to an earlier point in the story in case you wish to re-experience key events, such as the True Ending.
Any excess Kudos you have already spent will be refunded.
Life Tax (Hades): increased effectiveness; restorative effect is no longer reduced by Vow of Scars (Oath)
Mist Veil: now restores Magick that is lost for any reason (not just from using Omega Moves)"},{"url":"https://hades2.wiki.fextralife.com/Patch+Notes","title":"All Patch Notes on Hades 2 Complete List | Hades 2 Wiki","content":"Patch Notes Hades 2 Wiki for Hades 2 show all the latest fixes and changes made by the developer, Supergiant Games.
Players can check this page whenever they want to read about the newest game adjustments.
While this update marks the conclusion of our Early Access development, we will be monitoring this launch closely and patching any issues that arise.
To all our Early Access players, thank you so much!
Achievements: earn 50 different Achievements as you play through the game
Fixed interaction between Howling Soul (Hades) and Anvil Ring (Hephaestus) or Arctic Ring (Demeter)
Ares: Plasma can no longer grant more than +100% move and strike speed, which caused various issues
Fixed an issue causing the Rush Boon bonus from Umbral Flames (Supay) to affect indirect Boons such as Beach Ball (Poseidon x Apollo)
Fixed Past Deeds screen not showing more than 36 Boons if you had that many
Several characters now have all of their Gift events (others are still to be added)
You have a chance to Dodge damage; this is doubled vs.
Similar to the now-cut Soft Caress (Aphrodite x Hephaestus), this causes the next instance of damage you would take to instead restore that much Life.
Gain +1 each Elemental Essence and an Infusion Boon for it
Sister Blades (Artemis): you will Block again if the effect recharges while you are channeling; Block now takes priority over Dodge and similar effects."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Hades II Post-Launch Patch 3 patch notes latest changes","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hades_(video_game)","title":"Hades (video game) - Wikipedia","content":"# *Hades* (video game). * Edit&action=edit \"Edit this page [e]\"). | Release | * **macOS**, **Switch**, **Windows** * September 17, 2020 * **PS4**, **PS5**, **Xbox One**, **Series X/S** * August 13, 2021 * **iOS** * March 19, 2024 |. ***Hades*** is a 2020 roguelike action role-playing game developed and published by Supergiant Games. It was released for macOS, Nintendo Switch, and Windows on September 17, 2020, following an early access release in December 2018. It was later released for PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, and Xbox Series X/S in August 2021, and was released for iOS in March 2024 through Netflix Games. Players control Zagreus \"Zagreus (Hades)\"), the son of Hades, as he attempts to escape from the Underworld to reach Mount Olympus, at times aided by boons the other Olympians bestow on him. A sequel, *Hades II*, was released in early access in 2024, and had its full release in 2025.","score":0.26456657,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://store.steampowered.com/app/1145360/Hades","title":"Hades on Steam","content":"Get the Steam Mobile App. All trademarks are property of their respective owners in the US and other countries. Link to the Steam Homepage. Defy the god of the dead as you hack and slash out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler from the creators of Bastion, Transistor, and Pyre. Overwhelmingly Positive  (141,388)   - 98% of the 141,388 user reviews for this game are positive. English Reviews Overwhelmingly Positive (98% of 141,388) Recent Reviews:. **Hades** is a *god-like* rogue-like dungeon crawler that combines the best aspects of Supergiant's critically acclaimed titles, including the fast-paced action of **Bastion**, the rich atmosphere and depth of **Transistor**, and the character-driven storytelling of **Pyre**. As the immortal Prince of the Underworld, you'll wield the powers and mythic weapons of Olympus to break free from the clutches of the god of the dead himself, while growing stronger and unraveling more of the story with each unique escape attempt.","score":0.14754318,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.supergiantgames.com/games/hades","title":"Supergiant Games' Hades","content":"Hades is a rogue-like dungeon crawler in which you defy the god of the dead as you hack and slash your way out of the Underworld of Greek myth.","score":0.13353972,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hades","title":"Hades - Wikipedia","content":"# Hades. God of the underworld in Greek mythology. This article is about the Greek god. For the location, see Greek underworld and Christian views on Hades. | * King of the underworld * God of the dead and riches |. **Hades** (/ˈheɪdiːz/; Ancient Greek: ᾍδης, romanised: *Hā́idēs*, Attic Greek: , later ), in the ancient Greek religion and mythology, is the god of the dead and riches and the King of the underworld, with which his name became synonymous. Hades received the underworld, Zeus the sky, and Poseidon the sea, with the solid earth, which was long the domain of Gaia \"Gaia (mythology)\"), available to all three concurrently. Roman-era mythographers eventually equated the Etruscan god Aita, and the Roman gods Dis Pater and Orcus, with Hades, and merged all these figures into Pluto \"Pluto (mythology)\"), a Latinisation of **Plouton** (Ancient Greek: Πλούτων, romanised: *Ploútōn*), itself a euphemistic title (meaning \"the rich one\") often given to Hades.","score":0.1087274,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.theoi.com/Khthonios/Haides.html","title":"HADES (Haides) - Greek God of the Dead, King of the Underworld (Roman Pluto)","content":"Greek Mythology >> Greek Gods >> Underworld Gods >> Hades (Haides). # HAIDES. Hades and Persephone | Apulian red-figure amphora C4th B.C. Hades and Persephone, Apulian red-figure amphora C4th B.C., British Museum. HAIDES (Hades) was the king of the underworld and god of the dead. Haides was also the god of the hidden wealth of the earth, from the fertile soil with nourished the seed-grain, to the mined wealth of gold, silver and other metals. Haides was devoured by Kronos (Cronus) as soon as he was born, along with four of his siblings. When the three victorious brothers then drew lots for the division of the cosmos, Haides received the third portion, the dark dismal realm of the underworld, as his domain. Haides desired a bride and petitioned his brother Zeus to grant him one of his daughters. The god offered him Persephone, the daughter of Demeter. Hades is a son of Cronus and Rhea, and a brother of Zeus and Poseidon.","score":0.077608645,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.86,"request_id":"7785d418-bc13-4efd-a6a4-cb0e15c14cd7"}
